_comment: Stryker mutation testing — TARGETED at the strict honesty-fold set (council §E). Mutates ONLY the never-a-false-claim folds: the cell key.t trichotomy (cell-diff.ts), the confidence folds + cross-model cone (col-lineage.ts), and the byte-span reshaper (raw-spans.ts). NOT whole-suite (mirrors the Rust targeted cargo-mutants posture). Gate: >=90% kill overall, 100% on the cell trichotomy (cell-diff.ts).
_thresholds_comment: high/low = the council target. break = 90: the strict honesty-fold set GATES at >=90% kill (cute-dbt#492 raised it from the old 80 floor). cell-diff.ts (the cell trichotomy) stays at 100%; col-lineage.ts + raw-spans.ts each clear >=90% after killing every real honesty-bearing survivor + suppressing the documented equivalents (defensive null-guards the Zod schema makes unreachable on validated input + presentation tone/label strings gated by the design-system pass) — each suppression carries an inline `tracked: cute-dbt#514` justification per the org exclusions rule. Mirrors the Rust targeted cargo-mutants posture: scheduled/manual, not a per-PR blocking gate.
